title: Extend the SQLite index to all record types
description: Today the index covers tasks only. Extend reindex and the index to issues, claims, and messages so inbox and thread queries move from in-memory scans to the disposable index (spec §9). Keep the index rebuildable and non-canonical.
acceptance: `reindex` builds index tables for tasks, issues, claims, and messages.
inbox and thread queries can be served from the index.
Deleting index.sqlite and rebuilding yields equivalent query results.
bun:test covers a rebuild across record types.
